positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of celestial botanicals. A central arrangement features bioluminescent flowers, fractal leaves, and stylized constellations intertwined with elegant geometric mandalas. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, and vibrant glowing gold accents. The style is a fusion of Neo-Psychedelic Art and Art Deco etching, utilizing clean, thick silhouettes and intricate line work. Centered composition, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Glowing effects, vector illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, smudge, poorly rendered, dirty, low contrast, photorealistic
